name: Finlay Minerals Ltd.
summary: Finlay Minerals Ltd. engages in the acquisition and exploration of base and precious metal deposits in northern British Columbia, Canada. It focuses on the exploration for gold-rich copper porphyry, epithermal gold, and mesothermal silver-copper targets, as well as lead, zinc, arsenic, bismuth, and tellurium deposits. The company holds interests in the Silver Hope property with 29 mineral tenures covering an area of 10,039 hectares located to the southeast of Houston, British Columbia; the Atty property with 13 mineral tenure claims covering an area of 3,393 hectares situated in the Toodoggone mining district; and the PIL Property with 48 tenures covering an area of 17,006 hectares located in north-central British Columbia. Finlay Minerals Ltd. was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
